data.description:
Migrate 7+ inline <a> 'fake button' patterns (border border-foreground/20 rounded-md px-8 py-5 text-sm tracking-widest uppercase bg-foreground/[0.03] hover:bg-foreground/10 + CornerDecorations) to the Button component. May require Button to support 'asChild' (Radix Slot) so an anchor can wrap it without nested interactives.

Spec: .lattice/notes/typography-spec-20260607.md.

Why: The same button styling is duplicated across 7+ pages instead of consuming the Button component. The Button 'default' variant already renders this. Consolidation eliminates drift; future variant changes propagate automatically. Depends on FRAC-51 foundation (for any new size variants).

Acceptance: Every CTA on EventsPage, PeoplePage, PoliticalClubPage, NeighborhoodPage, LabPage, LiberalArts (and any others found) renders via <Button> or <Button asChild>. No inline duplicate styling remains. CornerDecorations behavior preserved.
data.title: Button consolidation — fake CTAs migrate to Button component

data.body: Scope addition: ensure no button text extends past its container. Observed visually in at least 2 places. Sweep every CTA at 375px mobile baseline + common desktop widths during planning. See updated 'Text containment' subsection in .lattice/notes/typography-spec-20260607.md for fix-path guidance (prefer min-width/wrap over ellipsis — editorial chrome wants short labels, not truncation).

Review verdict: PASS

Diff: 3 files, 43+/35-. not-found.tsx, Campus.tsx PrimaryButton wrapper, buttons.test.tsx.

Acceptance criteria: all met. not-found.tsx migrated to <Button asChild><Link>; Campus PrimaryButton wrap=true default applied; FRAC-86 regression suite rewritten to assert Button-based pattern; grep audit clean (bg-foreground/[0.03] only at the 2 documented out-of-scope sites); pnpm build/typecheck/test (143/4 baseline, buttons 22/22), DESIGN.md lint 0 errors.

Text-containment fix is sound: max-w-xs (320px) minus px-8 chrome leaves ~256px content, ~22-24 chars/line; 44-53 char labels wrap to 2-3 lines with whitespace-normal + leading-snug. Short-label CTAs unchanged visually (leading-snug only manifests on wraps). Mandelbrot corners position:absolute at 4px insets so they hug the container regardless of multi-line height.

cn precedence verified: Tailwind twMerge resolves whitespace-nowrap (Button base) vs whitespace-normal (consumer, last-wins) correctly. wouter Link + Slot + cloneElement inject corners into the rendered <a> correctly.

Notes: PR description references .lattice/plans/* and .lattice/notes/typography-spec-20260607.md which aren't committed in the branch. Per prior-session pattern (lattice state lives in main repo, not in branches). Not blocking. Reviewer also flagged a short-code resolution error from the worktree — same .lattice/ids.json staleness pattern documented in the 2026-06-07 handoff. Comment posted from main repo where short-codes resolve.

Recommendation: merge.
